message:
feat(build): add native-embed target for OOM-free large bundle builds

Adds native-embed build target that embeds raw bytecode via @embedFile,
avoiding the 321MB C hex array that caused OOM during compilation.

- Add native-embed target to build.zig
- Add native_main_embed.zig entry point for embedded bytecode
- Update runtime.zig to generate raw bytecode and use native-embed

The native-embed approach:
1. Uses qjsc -b to generate raw bytecode (not C hex array)
2. Embeds bytecode via Zig @embedFile (linker handles it)
3. Frozen module is still generated as Zig code

This solves the memory exhaustion issue when building large bundles
like TypeScript compiler (~10MB JS bundle -> 321MB C file).
